description_long: This is a white ceramic cup with a large, rounded handle and a colorful printed design. The artwork features two cartoon characters, one adult and one child, both smiling and holding hands, surrounded by red hearts. The phrase 'Feliz Dia das Mães' is prominently displayed in bold white and pink letters inside a large red heart, indicating a Mother's Day theme in Portuguese. The background is a soft pink with subtle polka dots, adding a playful and festive touch. The cup's surface appears smooth and glossy, typical of glazed ceramic mugs. The interior is plain white, and the handle is ergonomically shaped for easy gripping.
description: A white ceramic cup with a glossy finish, featuring cheerful cartoon characters and a 'Feliz Dia das Mães' Mother's Day design with red hearts on a pink polka-dot background.
description_view_0: Front view showing two cartoon characters, one adult and one child, with part of a red heart and the background pattern visible.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the large red heart with the 'Feliz Dia das Mães' text and several smaller hearts, with the handle partially visible.
description_view_2: Side view focusing on the plain white handle and a partial glimpse of the red heart and background design.
description_view_3: View centered on the 'Feliz Dia das Mães' text inside the red heart, with the handle fully visible on the left.
